channel.title: about on Dr Dave Powell
channel.description: Recent content in about on Dr Dave Powell

item.title: 📝 About Page 🤖 👩‍💻 ♾️
item.description: This is mainly a collection of notes, about mainly Linux. It is things people have asked me for, and it is easier to write it down (e.g. for someone overseas), or it is something I need every so often and I forget and then the Google trawling is non-trivial to find the good post that you remember from ten years ago. So it is captured here. Personally, I grew up in the UK, in the working class north.
